1507100001.korean:
적은 고속 교란용 연결체.
따라서 우리의 전투는 이 작전에서 제공권을 잡는 중요한 전투가 될 거야.
1507100001.english: The enemy’s a high‑speed disruption link, so this fight will be a crucial battle for securing air superiority.

1507100006.english: If Lindti wants to get cuter, she needs to eat more.

1507100007.korean: 아무리 귀여운 린티라도 이렇게 많이는 무리일지도…
1507100007.english: Even cute Lindti might be overdoing it like this…

1507100008.korean: 블랙 하운드도, 평소에 좋아하는 걸로 가져왔네.
1507100008.english: Blackhound also brought something she usually likes.

1507100009.korean: 와! 안 그래도 생각났는데 잘 먹겠습니다!
1507100009.english: Wow! I was already thinking about it—I'll dig in!

1507100010.korean: 여기 따뜻한 음료일세, 마시면 긴장이 풀릴 게야.
1507100010.english: Here’s a warm drink; it’ll help you relax.

1507100011.english: Thank you. I feel a bit more comfortable.

1507100012.korean:
지금은 이것밖에 못 해주지만, 전투가 끝나면 또 안아주겠네.
물론 전부 다 말일세.
1507100012.english: I can only offer this for now, but after the battle I’ll give you a hug again. Of course, all of you.

1507100013.korean: 네~! 포옹 받을 수 있도록 열심히 할게요!
1507100013.english: Sure! I’ll work hard so I can get that hug!

1507100016.english: Oh dear, such an impatient kid.

1507100018.korean:
두 사람도 먹게나.
내가 그렇게 많이 먹으라고 했는데 아직도 그 체형이면 싸울 때 힘이 나겠나!
1507100018.english: You two, eat up. I told you to eat a lot, but if you stay that skinny, will you even have strength in battle?

1507100019.english: I’m fine. Just make sure to take good care of the lieutenant.

1507100020.korean: 뭐죠? 마치 자기는 성장할 만큼 성장했으니 필요 없다는 뜻으로 들리는데요?
1507100020.english: What? It sounds like you’re saying you don’t need it because you’ve already grown enough.

1507100021.korean: 어머? 자의식 과잉이 아닐까? 내가 말한 건 '체형' 쪽의 얘기인데?
1507100021.english: Oh? Isn’t that a bit overconfident? I was talking about your “figure,” you know.

1507100022.english: Hehe, of course I’m talking about the “figure” too.

1507100023.korean: 음, 모르는 사이 뭔가가 시작된 모양이구만.
1507100023.english: Hmm, looks like something started without us noticing.

1507100024.korean:
잘은 모르겠지만, 두 사람 다 조심하게나.
위험하면 무리하지 말고 꼭 이탈하게.
1507100024.english: I’m not entirely sure, but you both be careful. If it gets dangerous, don’t push yourself—make sure to retreat.

1507100025.korean: 이제는 목숨을 바쳐서라도 임무를 달성하겠다고 하지 않네?
1507100025.english: Now you’re saying you’ll achieve the mission even if it costs your lives, right?

1507100026.english: “If you’re from Orca, follow Orca’s rules.”

1507100027.english: Weren’t you the one who told us that?

1507100028.korean: 후후, 이 방식도 나쁘지 않다고 생각하게 됐네.
1507100028.english: Hehe, I’ve come to think this method isn’t so bad.

1507100029.korean: 허나 목숨을 바치지 않지만, 임무는 반드시 달성할 생각이네.
1507100029.english: But even without sacrificing your life, you intend to see the mission through.

1507100031.korean: 하하하, 우리 사령관이 하도 욕심쟁이다 보니 나에게 옮은 모양이네.
1507100031.english: Haha, our commander’s such a greedy guy that he ended up passing it over to me.

1507100032.english: If it’s good, then it’s good!

1507100035.english: Let’s all get back safely again this time!
